creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have just uploaded new port 'Virtual Game Boy'.
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/vgb.tgz
It needs some against-law cartridge files even when core team people or so test this port,
so I show some sites(illegal) includes GameBoy cartridges.
http://consider.ferris.edu:8000/gameboy/gameboy.html
http://mail.bcpl.lib.md.us/~dstrickl/gbgames/
http://www.worldonline.nl/~terdudio/gameboy/

Nintendo GameBoy is the world-wide famous handy
-type game machine. It use only little monocrome displat but it shows
very various games.

Please take a look.

					Yukihiro Nakai
					<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
